name: art-and-fear
description: David Bayles and Ted Orland's 'Art & Fear: Observations on the Perils (and Rewards) of Artmaking' — a classic guide to the creative process. Not about how to paint or write, but about the internal obstacles that prevent artists from doing their work: fear, perfectionism, self-doubt, and the gap between vision and execution. An essential companion for any artist, writer, or creator struggling to make the work they want to make.
